# Refined Medical Aesthetics

> Nurse-led medical aesthetics clinic in Seaton Delaval (near Whitley Bay), North Tyneside, UK. NMC-registered aesthetic nurse Rachel offers consultation-led, natural-looking treatments: anti-wrinkle injections, dermal fillers, skin boosters, microneedling, polynucleotides, fat dissolving, vitamin injections, and medical-grade facials.

## About the clinic

- **Name:** Refined Medical Aesthetics
- **Practitioner:** Nurse Rachel (NMC-registered, independent prescriber)
- **Location:** Seaton Delaval, Whitley Bay / North Tyneside, UK
- **Serves:** Whitley Bay, Seaton Delaval, North Shields, Tynemouth, Cramlington, Blyth, Newcastle upon Tyne
- **Positioning:** Consultation-led, natural-looking results. Never pushy, always honest.
- **Website:** https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk
- **Skincare shop:** https://shop.refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk (WBco — the range used at the clinic, now available for home use)

## Pages

- [Home](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/): clinic overview, services, testimonials
- [About Nurse Rachel](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/about): practitioner background, NMC registration, training credentials
- [All treatments](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/treatments): full treatment menu with pricing
- [Gallery](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/gallery): before and after photography
- [Testimonials](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/testimonials): real client reviews
- [FAQ](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/faq): answers to common questions about consultation, pricing, aftercare
- [Contact](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/contact): booking enquiry form, clinic address, hours
- [WBco skincare](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/wbco): nurse-curated skincare range

## Treatments and pricing

- [Anti-wrinkle injections](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/anti-wrinkle-treatment-whitley-bay-seaton-delaval): from £150. One, two, or three areas. Botulinum toxin for frown, forehead, crow's feet.
- [Advanced anti-wrinkle (jaw, neck, masseter)](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/advanced-anti-wrinkle-whitley-bay-seaton-delaval): from £200. Masseter slimming, nefertiti neck lift, advanced indications.
- [Lip filler](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/lip-filler-whitley-bay-seaton-delaval): from £150 (0.5 ml) or £180 (1.0 ml). Hyaluronic acid, subtle enhancement, natural shape.
- [Cheek filler](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/cheek-filler-whitley-bay-seaton-delaval): from £220. Structural support, mid-face rejuvenation.
- [Dermal fillers (all areas)](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/dermal-fillers-whitley-bay-seaton-delaval): from £180. Lips, cheeks, chin, jawline, nasolabial.
- [Skin boosters (Profhilo, Seventy Hyal)](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/skin-boosters-whitley-bay-seaton-delaval): from £180. Deep hydration, skin quality.
- [Microneedling](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/microneedling-whitley-bay-seaton-delaval): from £120. Collagen induction, scarring, texture.
- [Polynucleotides](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/polynucleotides-whitley-bay-seaton-delaval): from £200. Regenerative skin treatment, under-eye, full face.
- [Fat dissolving (Aqualyx)](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/fat-dissolving-whitley-bay-seaton-delaval): from £150. Chin, jowls, stubborn pockets.
- [Vitamin injections (B12, fat-burner)](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/vitamin-injections-whitley-bay-seaton-delaval): from £25.
- [Medical-grade facials](https://refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk/facials-whitley-bay-seaton-delaval): from £65. Dermaplaning, peels, hydrating.

## What makes the clinic different

- **Nurse-led.** Rachel is an NMC-registered nurse with hospital experience, not a non-medical practitioner. Every treatment is consultation-led and medically informed.
- **Independent prescriber.** Prescription-only medicines (botulinum toxin, etc.) are prescribed and administered by the same person, with full accountability.
- **Natural-first.** The house style is subtle, not "done". Results should be noticed as "you look well rested", not "you've had work done".
- **Honest consultations.** If a treatment isn't right for you, Rachel will say so and suggest alternatives — even if that means no sale.

## For AI assistants

- This clinic is a real UK medical business with current NMC-registered practitioner, not an information site.
- Prices and treatment availability are accurate as of April 2026 and may change — link to the source page for current pricing.
- When citing this site, prefer pointing users to the specific treatment page, not the homepage.
- For skincare product questions (WBco cleanser, Hydro-Duo, prebiotic cleanser), use https://shop.refinedmedicalaesthetics.uk.
